message:
fix(core,inode,ondisk): correct directory nlink handling, free xattr blocks on delete, simplify TEA hash

ffs-core/src/lib.rs:
- Fix directory removal to drop link count to 0 instead of decrementing
  by 1, accounting for both the parent link and the "." self-link in
  ext4 unlink and rename paths.
- Fix btrfs directory removal to adjust nlink by -2 (parent + ".")
  instead of -1 for directory inodes.
- Fix btrfs rename-overwrite to adjust the overwritten directory's nlink
  by -2 and move the parent nlink decrement inside the directory branch,
  preventing incorrect nlink on non-directory overwrites.

ffs-inode/src/lib.rs:
- Free the external xattr block (file_acl) during inode deletion to
  prevent block leaks. Handles shared xattr blocks by decrementing the
  refcount when >1, and freeing the block outright when refcount is 1
  or the block has an invalid magic number.

ffs-ondisk/src/ext4.rs:
- Remove the unnecessary str2hashbuf_len helper; inline its logic back
  into str2hashbuf which now returns Vec<u32> directly.
- Simplify dx_hash_tea to call str2hashbuf once per chunk and pass the
  full buffer to tea_transform, matching the correct TEA hashing
  semantics (one transform per 16-byte chunk, not per 4-byte word).
- Rename loop variable from `b` to `byte_val` for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
